role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script and grammar of the visible sign.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and architectural style.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed vegetation types and regional profiles.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings, traffic side, and signage.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized infrastructure details (poles, walls) to distinguish region.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Transcription of the sign is accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Description of hills and autumn foliage matches image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road markings and sign placement described correctly.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The agents correctly identified the Cyrillic script and Balkan landscape. The linguistic agent provided the strongest evidence for Bulgaria specifically. The judge correctly synthesized this to identify Bulgaria, despite the ground truth coordinates being slightly off (likely due to the rural nature of the location).
verdict.region_narrowing_notes: The judge correctly identified a consensus on the Balkan region (Europe) from all agents, specifically narrowing it down to Bulgaria based on the linguistic evidence which was the strongest differentiator.
verdict.hypothesis_pool_notes: The pool included Bulgaria, North Macedonia, and Serbia. These are all visually plausible candidates given the landscape and Cyrillic script. The pool was well-calibrated to the visual evidence.
